title: achoriphragma asperrimum
intro: Achoriphragma asperrimum is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a thorny shrub or thistle. The plant is known to have medicinal properties, with the roots and leaves being used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Achoriphragma asperrimum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
